zh.lifeSummary: 當Marion Margaret Boyd於1477年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾時，她的父親Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw24歲，母親Christian Mure21歲。她於從1494年到1495年與John Mure 2nd of Rowallan在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1559年8月31日在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾艾比享年82歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marion Margaret Boyd于1477年出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾时，她的父亲Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw24岁，母亲Christian Mure21岁。她于从1494年到1495年与John Mure 2nd of Rowallan在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1559年8月31日在英国苏格兰雷福福爾艾比享年82岁，埋葬在苏格兰米德洛迪安。

nameMeanings.name: Boyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the island of Bute in the Firth of Clyde, from Bòid (genitive case of Bòd, the Gaelic name of the island of Bute) or Bòideach, denoting a person from Bute. Alternatively, the name may denote descendants of a Gilla filius Boed, who appears in reference to Glasgow Cathedral in the early 12th century, perhaps from the Gaelic personal name Boite, of uncertain origin.
Scottish and Irish: from the Gaelic epithet buidhe ‘yellow(-haired)’. Compare Bowie .
Manx: from Mac Gille Buidhe ‘son of the yellow-haired lad’ (compare 2 above).

variants.name: Bowie
meanings: Scottish: from Gaelic buidhe ‘yellow’, i.e. ‘yellow-haired’, pronounced as two syllables. The equivalent term in Ireland is buí, often Anglicized as boy. The surname may also be a shortened form of Gilboy .
Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Marion Margaret Boyd was born in 1477, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw, was 24 and her mother, Christian Mure, was 21. She married John Mure 2nd of Rowallan from 1494 to 1495, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 31 August 1559, in Abbey, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 82, and was buried in Midlothian, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marion Margaret Boyd est née en 1477, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Christian Mure, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John Mure 2nd of Rowallan du 1494 au 1495, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 août 1559, à Abbey, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterrée à Midlothian, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marion Margaret Boyd 1477 in Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw 24 und ihre Mutter Christian Mure 21. Sie hat von 1494 bis 1495 in Scotland John Mure 2nd of Rowallan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. August 1559 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Abbey, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Midlothian, Scotland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Marion Margaret Boydが1477年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで生まれた時，父Archibald Boyd of Bonshawは24歳，母Christian Mureは21歳であった。から1494年まで1495年にスコットランドでJohn Mure 2nd of Rowallanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1559年8月31日にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアアビーで82歳で死去し，スコットランドミドロスアンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marion Margaret Boyd(이)가 1477년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christian Mure(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1494년 부터 1495년 까지 스컷랜드에서 John Mure 2nd of Rowallan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1559년 8월 31일 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 애브브이에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com John Mure 2nd of Rowallan de 1494 a 1495, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de agosto de 1559, em Abbey, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 82 anos, e foi sepultada em Midlothian, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marion Margaret Boyd родилась в 1477 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Christian Mure, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Mure 2nd of Rowallan с 1494 по 1495 в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 31 августа 1559 г. в местности эбби, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет и была похоронена в местности мидлотян, Шотландия.
